steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Since line $r$ is parallel to line $s$, the angle marked $x^{\circ}$ and the $21^{\circ}$ angle are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Set the angles equal
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by parallel lines and a transversal are congruent. $$x^{\circ}=21^{\circ}$$ The answer is 21.
